raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tahs wezzas Wahrtis
aifija Jojadas/ Paffen Dehls/
n Mesullams/ Besodijafa
Dehls/ tee apfede tahs/ un ee-
eble winnu Durwis/ ar fawabm
Attlehgahm/ un fawecin
Breekfschaujamem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tahis winneem strah-
aja Melattias tas Gibeonite-
is/ un Jaddus tas Meronoti-
ris/ tee Wihri no Gibeona/ un
o Mizpas/ lihds to Krehsfu ta
Seimmes Walditaja fchaipufe
ppes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Sahnis winnu strahdaja
fiets/ Arkajata Dehls/ no teem
zudrab Kallejeem. Sahnis
innu strahdaja Anantius/
eens Dehls/ weena no teem
ipteekereem/ un tee istaisija Je-
salemi/lihds tam plattam Muh-
m.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Sahnis winnu strahdaja
Rewajus/ Urra Dehls/ tas
Wirfneeks pahr weenu Jerusale-
es puſs Zettortni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un sahnis winnu strah-
aja Jedajus/ tas Dehls Aru-
awa/ fawam Nammain pret-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tahnis winnu strahdaja
ttus/ tas Dehls Asabenijus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Weenn diwkahrtigu Meih-
strahdaja Makijus/ Arima
ehls/ un Asubs/ tas Padt
Noaba Dehls/ lihds ar to Zepta
ohrnt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tahns winnu strahdaja
Sallums/ Ahloefa Dehls/ tas
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tahs Feleijas Wahrti-
taisija Anuns/ un tee Eedsihwo-
taji no Sansas/ tee taisija tahs,
un eezehle winnu Durwis/ win-
nu Atflehgas/ un winni
Preekfschaujamos/ ir tuhkfsto-
fchas Ohlektis pee ta Muhra
lihds tahm Suhdu-Wahrtim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tahs Suhdu-Wahrtie
taisija Malkijus/Rekaba Dehls/
tas Wirfneeks pahr to Zettortni,
kur tee Wihna-Dahrsneeki dsh-
wo/ wiꞥsch nhstaifija tahs/ un
eezehle winnu Durwis/ winnu
Atflehgas/ un winnu Preekfs-
chaujamos.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tahs Akku Wahrtie
taisija Sallums/ Kal Kohsue
Dehls/tas Wirfneeks pahr Miz-
pas Zettortni/ wiꞥsch uhstaifija
tahs/ un apfede tahs/ un eezeh-
le winnu Durwis/ winnu At-
flehgas/un winnu Preekfschau-
jamos. Ka arri to Muhri to
Dihka Selons/ pee ta Rehniza
Dahrsa/ lihds tahm Pakahpehm/
kas no Dahwida Pilsfahta eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz to taisija Neemi-
jus/ Asbuka Dehls/ tas Wir-
neeks pahr to puſs Zettortni-
eeksch Betzura/ lihds Dahwida
Kappam pretti/ un lihds Asujas
Dihkim/ un lihdstam Namman
to Warreno.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz winnu taisija tee
Lewiti/ Rekums Banus Dehls.
Sahnis winnu strahdaja Asa-
bijus/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
